identity.name: Release Checklist
identity.description: Prepare a release through an approved fixed workflow.

use_when: a fixed release handoff needs to be prepared
do_not_use_when: fresh evidence must select a different next repair

steps: Prepare the release handoff in the required order.
success_evidence: The handoff contains every approved release item.
failure_or_stop: Stop when the approved release scope is missing or contradictory.
